title: Daily Memo: On US Drones and Strikes on Iran
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Mass production. The Pentagon wants to mass-produce a low-cost one-way attack drone that the U.S. has been using in the Iran conflict, the Wall Street Journal reported. The Low-Cost Uncrewed Combat Attack System, or Lucas, is essentially the U.S. analogue to Iran’s Shahed system. It was first deployed to the Middle East in December and […]

The post Daily Memo: On US Drones and Strikes on Iran appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Mass production. The Pentagon wants to mass-produce a low-cost one-way attack drone that the U.S. has been using in the Iran conflict, the Wall Street Journal reported. The Low-Cost Uncrewed Combat Attack System, or Lucas, is essentially the U.S. analogue to Iran’s Shahed system. It was first deployed to the Middle East in December and […]
